Class TcpRobotService

java.lang.Object
edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TcpRobotService
All Implemented Interfaces:
RobotService, AutoCloseable
public class TcpRobotService extends Object implements RobotService
An implementation of RobotService that uses TCP/IP for communication with a discovered robot. This service establishes a socket connection, sends messages, and receives responses over TCP. It also handles connection and disconnection logic.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TcpRobotService(DiscoveredRobot robot)
    Constructs a new TcpRobotService.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Closes the service, disconnecting from the robot.

    Establishes a TCP connection to the robot.

    Disconnects from the robot and closes all associated resources.
    boolean
    isConnected()
    Checks if the service is currently connected to the robot.

    Receives a message from the connected robot.

  • Constructor Details

    • TcpRobotService

      public TcpRobotService(DiscoveredRobot robot)
      Constructs a new TcpRobotService.
      Parameters:
      robot - The DiscoveredRobot instance containing the robot's connection details.

  • Method Details

    • connect

      public void connect()
      Establishes a TCP connection to the robot. If already connected, this method does nothing.
      Specified by:
      connect in interface RobotService
      Throws:
      RobotServiceException - if the connection cannot be established.

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Disconnects from the robot and closes all associated resources. This method can be called multiple times safely.
      Specified by:
      disconnect in interface RobotService

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Checks if the service is currently connected to the robot.
      Specified by:
      isConnected in interface RobotService
      Returns:
      true if the socket is connected and not closed, false otherwise.

    • send

      public void send(String message)
      Sends a message to the connected robot. A newline character is appended to the message as a protocol delimiter.
      Specified by:
      send in interface RobotService
      Parameters:
      message - The message string to send.
      Throws:
      RobotServiceException - if the service is not connected or if an I/O error occurs.

    • receive

      public String receive()
      Receives a message from the connected robot. This method blocks until a line is received or a timeout occurs.
      Specified by:
      receive in interface RobotService
      Returns:
      The received message string.
      Throws:
      RobotServiceException - if the service is not connected, if the connection is closed, or if an I/O error or timeout occurs.

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the service, disconnecting from the robot. This method is part of the AutoCloseable interface.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
